title: Realm
description: A mod that aims to expand the vanilla Minecraft experience!
body:
What is the 'Realm' mod?

This mod adds new items designed to keep in the style of vanilla. It tries to expand upon the vanilla experience! However, it'll never add features that might be added in future vanilla updates, It will only add things that are very unlikely to be added to vanilla!


How do updates work?

Every update will have a purpose and a theme, for example 1.0.0 was the Bricks and Boulders update. The update added 4 new types of brick variants originating from vanilla blocks!


How long will this mode be supported for?

This mod will be continued to be supported for as long as possible! 


 

 

All feedback is appreciated!
